'''nanguwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reactome|reactome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reactome|reactome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nanguwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nængiwith|nængiwith]] || [[word:nængiwij|nængiwij]] || [[word:nængiwish|nængiwish]] || [[word:nængiwi|nængiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangunguwuth|nangunguwuth]] || [[word:nangunguwuj|nangunguwuj]] || [[word:nangunguwush|nangunguwush]] || [[word:nangunguwu|nangunguwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nanguwuth|nanguwuth]] || [[word:nanguwuj|nanguwuj]] || [[word:nanguwush|nanguwush]] || [[word:nanguwu|nanguwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangufwuth|nangufwuth]] || [[word:nangufwuj|nangufwuj]] || [[word:nangufwush|nangufwush]] || [[word:nangufwuf|nangufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nanguwuthu|nanguwuthu]] || [[word:nanguwuju|nanguwuju]] || [[word:nanguwushu|nanguwushu]] || [[word:nanguwuku|nanguwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nanguwuth|nanguwuth]] || [[word:nanguwuj|nanguwuj]] || [[word:nanguwush|nanguwush]] || [[word:nanguwu|nanguwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nanguwuthul|nanguwuthul]] || [[word:nanguwujul|nanguwujul]] || [[word:nanguwushul|nanguwushul]] || [[word:nanguwukul|nanguwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nanguwuthuthu|nanguwuthuthu]] || [[word:nanguwujuju|nanguwujuju]] || [[word:nanguwushushu|nanguwushushu]] || [[word:nanguwuku|nanguwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nanguwuthun|nanguwuthun]] || [[word:nanguwujun|nanguwujun]] || [[word:nanguwushun|nanguwushun]] || [[word:nanguwukun|nanguwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nanguwuthuoro|nanguwuthuoro]] || [[word:nanguwujuoro|nanguwujuoro]] || [[word:nanguwushuoro|nanguwushuoro]] || [[word:nanguwukuoro|nanguwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
